title: Manitowoc 16000 – Annual Inspection and Load Test
description: Full annual inspection per ASME B30.5. Load test at 125% rated capacity – passed. Main hoist wire rope inspection – 18 months remaining. Boom chord inspection – no cracks. All limit switches and safety devices tested. Swing bearing clearance within spec. NDT on boom chords at 10 locations – all pass.

title: Terex CC 8800-1 – 500 Hour PM
description: Engine oil filter and hydraulic filter service. Boom pin lubrication. Crawler tension check and adjustment – both sides within spec. Wire rope lubrication – main hoist and auxiliary. Load chart verified and posted. All fluid levels checked and topped. Swing gearbox oil sample sent to lab.

title: Marine Crane Annual USCG Inspection
description: Annual inspection by USCG for operating certificate renewal. Hull integrity check – two hull plate welds repaired on port side. All deck equipment certified. Crane load test at 125% – passed. Fire suppression system serviced. Life safety equipment inventoried. Certificate renewed through January 2027.

title: Cascade Spirit – Dry Dock Hull Inspection
description: Biennial dry dock hull inspection and cleaning. Hull plates measured – all within Lloyd's survey limits. Sacrificial anodes replaced – 22 anodes. Thruster shaft seals replaced port and starboard. Anti-fouling bottom paint applied. All sea cocks inspected and greased. Certificate of inspection renewed.

title: Liebherr LTM 1500 – Wire Rope Replacement
description: Main hoist wire rope failed load test at 90% rated capacity – 4 broken wires in one lay detected during pre-shift inspection. Full replacement of 1400 ft main hoist rope. New rope break-in procedure completed. Load test at 100% capacity passed. All sheaves inspected – one sheave groove repaired.
